history.content: ✅ Started a new Telegram chat session. This thread is now linked to the new channel session.

Restart complete — Prometheus is back up, and Telegram polling has resumed successfully after the manual “Telegram quick restart.” No files were changed in this restart; this was a runtime/internal refresh to restore normal gateway flow. What would you like me to verify next: Telegram message receipt, outbound send, or full round-trip behavior?
